testcase.name: test_backend_rejects_missing_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: The setup method 'route' can no longer be called on the blueprint 'api_v1'. It has already been registered at least once, any changes will not be applied consistently. Make sure all imports, decorators, functions, etc. needed to set up the blueprint are done before registering it.

testcase.failure: tests\e2e\test_gameplay_seam_repairs.py:159: in test_backend_rejects_missing_required_fields from backend.app.api.v1.session_routes import _validate_world_engine_turn_contract backend\app\api\v1\session_routes.py:90: in <module> @api_v1_bp.route("/sessions", methods=["POST"]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\YvesT\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\flask\sansio\scaffold.py:46: in wrapper_func self._check_setup_finished(f_name) C:\Users\YvesT\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\flask\sansio\blueprints.py:215: in _check_setup_finished raise AssertionError( E AssertionError: The setup method 'route' can no longer be called on the blueprint 'api_v1'. It has already been registered at least once, any changes will not be applied consistently. E Make sure all imports, decorators, functions, etc. needed to set up the blueprint are done before registering it.
